message:
fix(auth): add C3.4 constraints to cross-cloud auth regression tokens (24llg.3.5)

The C3.4 default-deny enforcement rejects tokens without constraints.
Updated generate_valid_token() in AWS, S3, and GCP integration tests
to include CapabilityConstraints with resource_allow: ["*"]. All 59
cross-cloud auth regression tests now pass (10 AWS + 36 S3 + 13 GCP).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
